PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  wd:Q552314 wdt:P527 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P527 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P1546 ?episodeNumber .
  ?episode wdt:P1476 ?title .
}
ORDER BY(xsd:integer(?episodeNumber))
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 92
